Floor 1, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy 
Towers, Dalal Street 
Mumbai – 400001 
   Scrip Code: 532155  
 
Sub.: Link of Transcripts of Earning Conference Call held for discussing Unaudited 
Financial Results for the quarter and half year ended 30.09.2024 
 
Dear Sir/ Madam,  
 
This is in continuation to our letter of even no. ND/GAIL/SECTT/2024 dated 30.10.2024  
 
Please find below the link of Transcripts of Earning Conference Call held on Wednesday, 
06.11.2024. 
 
https://www.gailonline.com/pdf/InvestorsZone/GAIL_Earnings_Call_Q2_FY25_1111202
4.pdf 
 
This disclosure is in compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and 
Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.  
 
Thanking you, 
Yours faithfully, 
 
 
 
 
 
(Mahesh Kumar Agarwal) 
Company Secretary  
 
 
 
Mahesh 
Kumar 
Agarwal

by Mahesh
